verses.text: We faint not, renouncing dishonesty, 'by manifestation of the truth commending ourselves.' Open truth. He hides nothing but speaks plainly.
We faint not, renouncing dishonesty, 'by manifestation of the truth commending ourselves.' Open truth. He hides nothing but speaks plainly.
If our gospel be hid, 'the god of this world hath blinded the minds' of unbelievers. Blinded. Satan keeps the lost from the light of Christ.
If our gospel be hid, 'the god of this world hath blinded the minds' of unbelievers. Blinded. Satan keeps the lost from the light of Christ.
We preach not ourselves but Christ; God 'hath shined in our hearts' to give His light. Christ proclaimed. The gospel reveals the glory of God in Christ.
We preach not ourselves but Christ; God 'hath shined in our hearts' to give His light. Christ proclaimed. The gospel reveals the glory of God in Christ.
'We have this treasure in earthen vessels'; troubled, yet not distressed; cast down, but not destroyed. Frail vessels. God's power shines through our weakness.
'We have this treasure in earthen vessels'; troubled, yet not distressed; cast down, but not destroyed. Frail vessels. God's power shines through our weakness.
'We have this treasure in earthen vessels'; troubled, yet not distressed; cast down, but not destroyed. Frail vessels. God's power shines through our weakness.
Always bearing 'the dying of the Lord Jesus,' that His life be manifest in us. Death and life. We share His death that His life may show.
Always bearing 'the dying of the Lord Jesus,' that His life be manifest in us. Death and life. We share His death that His life may show.
Always bearing 'the dying of the Lord Jesus,' that His life be manifest in us. Death and life. We share His death that His life may show.
We believe, and therefore speak; all is for your sakes, to the glory of God. Faith speaks. Our labour aims at God's glory and others' good.
We believe, and therefore speak; all is for your sakes, to the glory of God. Faith speaks. Our labour aims at God's glory and others' good.
We believe, and therefore speak; all is for your sakes, to the glory of God. Faith speaks. Our labour aims at God's glory and others' good.
Though the outward man perish, the inward is renewed; 'our light affliction... worketh... a... eternal weight of glory.' Light to glory. Present trouble is brief beside the coming weight of glory.
